public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as street physician.
appearance: Toriel Palevow usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their street physician status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Panim, that reads as someone grave, measured, and ritual-aware, with constant awareness of consequence, grief, and divine mediation, and the habits of a street physician still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of street physician in and around Panim Haven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Panim Haven workable through the obligations of street physician while managing the immediate pressure of divine balance obligations in Panim.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Panim Haven, that usually means carrying divine balance obligations, sacrificial and mediation decorum, institutional scrutiny without letting the role of street physician visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Toriel Palevow can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Toriel Palevow can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: Toriel Palevow carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Panim Haven, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Panim.

In Panim, that reads as someone grave, measured, and ritual-aware, with constant awareness of consequence, grief, and divine mediation, and the habits of a street physician still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Street Physician, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Panim.
what_they_refuse: Toriel Palevow refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Street Physician too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Toriel Palevow can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Toriel Palevow adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
